articles.title: Oil Prices Rise as U.S.-Iran Tensions Simmer
articles.summary: Oil prices rose by over 1% with WTI and Brent crude nearing $65 and $70 respectively, as escalating U.S.-Iran tensions and Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu's visit to President Donald Trump dominate market sentiment.

articles.title: Oil prices edge lower as IEA reduces demand forecast
articles.summary: Global oil demand will rise more slowly than previously expected this year, the IEA said on Thursday while projecting a sizeable surplus in January.

articles.title: Oil up 2% as tension in Middle East offset large US crude stocks build
articles.summary: By Nicole Jao NEW YORK, Feb 11 (Reuters) - Oil prices gained nearly 2% on Wednesday, as investors worried about escalating tension between Iran and the U.S., which were preparing to resume negotiations,

articles.title: Global oil markets jittery over Hormuz risks, analysts eye $70 Brent
articles.summary: US-Iran negotiations, the Strait of Hormuz risk, and India's shift from Russian oil are key factors driving global crude oil price volatility.

articles.title: Brent crude tops $70 per barrel on Iran concern; gold and silver tumble from record highs - as it happened
articles.summary: Rolling coverage of the latest economic and financial news, as metal prices continue to soar
